Description: A large office / corporate headquarters located in Shenzhen, China. The building footprint is approximately 54.0 m (east-west) by 36.0 m (north-south), rectangular, with the long axis rotated 225 degrees from north. Total gross floor area is about 17500.0 m^2 spread over 9 floor(s), giving roughly 1944.4 m^2 per floor. Floor-to-floor height is 3.8 m. The building is divided into 54 thermal zones in total (about 6 per floor). Typical space layout: typical floor: open office + meeting rooms + core; ground retail/lobby, top executive floor. Window-to-wall ratio is approximately 40% on exterior walls, with windows distributed on all four facades. Model all zones with appropriate constructions, glazing, occupancy, lighting, equipment and HVAC (ideal loads) so the IDF runs in EnergyPlus without errors.
